label: Sales & Services Revenue
notes: disclosure-level detail; usually a dimension not a distinct concept

label: Other Operating Income
notes: EDINET usually reports below OperatingIncome not above

label: Pretax Income
notes: two rows share this code (Adjusted vs GAAP) - Bloomberg reuses PRETAX_INC label twice

label: Income from Continuing Operations
edinet_jppfs_tag: no distinct EDINET line (Japan GAAP rarely segregates continuing/discontinued)

label: Extraordinary Gain (Loss) Net of Tax
ifrs_full_tag: not applicable under IFRS (extraordinary items prohibited)
edinet_jppfs_tag: jppfs_cor:ExtraordinaryIncome / ExtraordinaryLoss (Japan GAAP still allows these)
notes: US GAAP concept was deprecated (ASU 2015-01) - rarely populated post-2015

label: Net Income (incl. Minority Interest)
notes: US GAAP has no single tag for pre-attribution NI; derived as NetIncomeLoss + attributable-to-NCI

label: Deferred Tax Assets
ifrs_full_tag: ifrs-full:CurrentTaxAssets (n.b. IFRS presents deferred tax as always non-current since IAS 1 amendment)

label: Gross Fixed Assets
edinet_jppfs_tag: jppfs_cor:PropertyPlantAndEquipmentGross (not a standard element - Japan GAAP shows net directly)
notes: EDINET typically shows PP&E net only in face BS; gross+accum.depr. found in notes tagged per-class

label: Short-Term Finance Lease Liabilities
ifrs_full_tag: ifrs-full:CurrentLeaseLiabilities (finance sub-type not separately tagged pre-2019 dual model)

label: Short-Term Operating Lease Liabilities
ifrs_full_tag: not applicable (IFRS 16 has single lease model - no operating/finance split)
notes: IFRS 16 eliminated the operating/finance distinction that still exists in US GAAP (ASC 842)

label: Preferred Stock & Hybrid Capital
edinet_jppfs_tag: jppfs_cor:PreferredStock (rare - most Japanese issuers have no preferred)
notes: Japan GAAP filers rarely populate this

label: Total Number of Employees
us_gaap_tag: dei:EntityNumberOfEmployees (not standard us-gaap; often only in 10-K text or Human Capital disclosure - no formal tag pre-2020)
ifrs_full_tag: no formal IFRS concept (disclosed as text/note)
notes: frequently not XBRL-tagged at all - sourced from prose/note disclosures

label: Net Income (CF start)
edinet_jppfs_tag: jppfs_cor:ProfitLossBeforeIncomeTaxes / ProfitLoss (starting line varies by presentation)

label: Disposal of Intangible Assets
notes: no dedicated US GAAP intangible-disposal tag; often folded into other investing lines

label: Income Taxes Paid
column9: not part of primary CF statement total
